description: Hot rolling pass through a two-high mill: fluted ingot/billet entering left (surface defect, V-shaped pipe cavity, dotted centerline segregation with inclusion specks), counter-rotating rolls with flow arrow, thin elongated plate exiting right. The surface defect becomes a tight straight longitudinal SEAM (red, draw-on) caught by low-angle grazing-light rays with glint+shadow; pipe/segregation flatten into cyan mid-thickness LAMINATIONS with a magnified plate-edge callout showing the parting line.
